components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: white; color: black; padding: 11px 18px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 hsla(0,0%,100%,0.5) inset, 0 6px 30px hsla(0,0%,100%,0.18); cursor: pointer; transition: transform .15s ease, background .2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ececec; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: hsla(0,0%,100%,0.04); border: 1px solid hsla(0,0%,100%,0.12); color: white; padding: 11px 18px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: hsla(0,0%,100%,0.08); border-color: hsla(0,0%,100%,0.22); }

components.name: Liquid Glass Badge
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: linear-gradient(180deg, hsla(0,0%,100%,0.06), hsla(0,0%,100%,0.015) 40%, hsla(0,0%,100%,0.04)); border: 1px solid hsla(0,0%,100%,0.12); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); color: white; }

narrative.overview: The SharkAuth visual system reflects a high-performance, invisible engine—powering the agent era with silent, absolute authority. It is a study in Minimalist Luxury, where every pixel must earn its place.
dos: Do use font-style: italic for the serif font
Do use 1px hairlines for all structural divisions
